title: xerololophus alpinus
intro: Xerololophus alpinus, also known as the Alpine Club Moss, is a species of moss that belongs to the family Dicranaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Xerololophus alpinus include its ability to reduce coughing and improve breathing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Xerololophus alpinus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
